🏢 FIRM PROFILE.restricted_countries: Afghanistan, Albania, Antarctica, Antigua and Barbuda, Bangladesh, Belarus, Belize, Bouvet Island, Burkina Faso, Burundi, Cape Verde, Chad, Comoros, Cook Islands, Cote d'Ivoire (Ivory Coast), Cuba, Democratic Republic of the Congo (Congo Free State), Djibouti, Eritrea, Fiji, Grenada, Guinea-Bissau, Iran, Iraq, Jordan, Laos, Lebanon, Lesotho, Libya, Malawi, Malaysia, Mali, Myanmar (Burma), North Korea, Palestinian Territory, Republic of the Congo (Congo Brazzaville), Russia, Rwanda, Sierra Leone, Somalia, South Sudan, Sri Lanka, Sudan, Syria, Tajikistan, Timor-Leste (East Timor), Tuvalu, Ukraine, Venezuela, Vietnam, Yemen
key_differentiators: 24-hour payout guarantee with $1,000 penalty if missed
15% performance bonus on challenge phase profits
Built specifically for futures (not CFD retrofit)

commission_structure.note: All-in rate: $3 to open, $3 to close, $1 exchange/NFA/regulatory on exit

💰 PRICING & OFFERS.spreads: Near-ECN, described as among tightest in industry

📊 CHALLENGE MODELS.description: Speed-focused with maximum flexibility. No consistency rule during challenge phase. No daily loss limit. Ideal for traders who want fast-paced, unrestricted evaluation.

passing_requirements.note: Meet target in 1 day or spread across multiple days

trading_rules.micro_scalping_rule: If >40% of total profit from trades closed within 10 seconds = breach
trading_rules.price_limit_rule: If contract within 2% of CME limit, stop trading that day
trading_rules.inactivity_rule: Must trade at least once every 7 days to keep account active
prohibited_strategies: Multiple Account Abuse (creating multiple accounts with different emails)
Fake Orders (excessive artificial orders to create fake trading volume)
Order Coordination (coordinating trades with others to influence orders)
Slow Data Feed Exploitation (using delayed data feeds for trading advantage)
Extreme Leverage (highly leveraged/high-risk trades to artificially escalate equity)
Latency Trading (exploiting errors in displayed prices or delays in updates)
Opposing Positions (opening opposite positions across multiple accounts to bypass restrictions)
Correlated Hedging (hedging correlated instruments across one or multiple accounts)
Extreme Market Conditions (trading during extreme gaps or low-liquidity conditions)
Grid Trading
Micro-Scalping (>40% of profit from <10sec trades)
Spoofing
Layering
Wash Trading
Account Rolling
Signal Services
DCA (adding to losing positions)
Multi-Order Spam and Coordinated Trading Exploits
Bracket Strategies

transition_to_funded.note: Consistency rule (40% max daily) APPLIES in FundedNext Account

📊 CHALLENGE MODELS.description: Lowest cost, quick rewards model. $99.99 one-time fee for $50K account. Capped payouts up to 5 withdrawals, then unlimited.

account_sizes.drawdown_model: 6% trailing drawdown (locks at $50,100 after first withdrawal)

passing_requirements.note: 40% consistency rule forces at least 3 trading days. No official minimum days but effectively required.

risk_limits.daily_loss_type: Soft Breach (trading pauses, resumes next day)
risk_limits.max_loss_type: Trailing EOD (locks at $50,100 after first withdrawal)
risk_limits.drawdown_note: Max loss limit caps at $50,100 permanently after first withdrawal

trading_rules.micro_scalping_rule: If >40% of total profit from trades closed within 10 seconds = breach
trading_rules.price_limit_rule: If contract within 2% of CME limit, stop trading that day
trading_rules.inactivity_rule: Must trade at least once every 7 days to keep account active

payout_structure.note: Withdrawal amounts: $250-$1,200 per cycle. After 5 withdrawals, unlimited at 80% split.

transition_to_funded.note: Bolt accounts have a defined endpoint (not ongoing). Consistency rule and daily loss limit REMOVED in funded phase.

top_strengths: Industry-leading 5-hour average payout (24-hour guarantee with $1K penalty)
Transparent $7 per contract roundtrip cost (no hidden fees)
Trader-friendly rules with no time limits
Built from ground up for futures, not retrofit
key_concerns: Strict compliance reviews on profitable accounts (7% negative reviews mention this)
Micro-scalping restrictions eliminate some trading styles
🏆 AGGREGATE METRICS.ideal_trader_profile: Intraday/swing traders seeking fast payouts, real CME pricing, and transparent rules
🏆 AGGREGATE METRICS.not_ideal_for: Overnight position traders, grid/scalping specialists, traders needing exotic leverage
